scripts.build: python3 scripts/generate-app-icon.py && pnpm clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build-renderer.mjs && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs
scripts.dev: pnpm build:trigger && pnpm build && node scripts/run-dev.mjs
scripts.smoke: pnpm build:trigger && pnpm build && TRIGGER_ADMIN_TOKEN=must-be-ignored TRIGGER_DESKTOP_SMOKE_TEST=1 electron .
